CreateSnatRule.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters, see [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md)
CreateSnatRule.ruleName: Name consisting of uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, and special characters -_ /., must start with a letter, length 1-65
CreateSnatRule.publicIpsAddress: Public IPs, EIPs or shared bandwidth IPs associated with the NAT gateway's snatEips or bindEips
CreateSnatRule.sourceCIDR: Private IP address or CIDR block
